case_title: GUASTUCCI REMO L. VS PAPINSKY STEVEN ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO.

docket_entries.description: CERT. LETTER TO STEVEN PAPINSKY RETURNED UNCLAIMED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GUASTUCCI REMO L. AS TO DEFENDANT PAPINSKY STEVEN  ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUASTUCCI REMO L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAPINSKY STEVEN  ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,513.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAPINSKY STEVEN  ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,625.12 AS TO DEFENDANT PAPINSKY STEVEN  ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAPINSKY STEVEN  ASSOC.LIMOUSINES CO.
